channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pot hole in grass area near goal concerned it’s an old manhole as there is a clear hole under concrete bridging, 19th April
item.description:
A hole has appeared in close proximity to the goal in Hollyoak park, the hole appearing looks quite deep should the concrete bridge give way. Also concerned someone could twist their ankle in it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Days Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please can these be trimmed right back or crowned, 19th April
item.description:
4 trees have never been trimmed or crowned These over hang the road, people’s gardens and are far taller than the block of flats. These have been neglected for years. Please can they be crowned like you do with others to encourage good growth

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heron Court, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 19th April
item.description:
Pothole kicking up stones and damaging cars.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priolo Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone is running a car sales from a residence, 19th April
item.description:
We face every day a minimum of 8 cars taking up parking for local residents in Joslin Road and Lockyer Road. I've seen a trade plate on one car which was L0365. Residents did report a few of the cars for not having tax which resulted in the police or DVLA clamping them. But the owner took the clamps off. Its unfair on the residents and also there is a pick up lorry constantly parking outside two properties in Lockyer Road and these residents are registered disabled. When approached to the driver he just waved them away. The vehicle reg is DK19 XKH. As residents we've had enough.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Joslin Road, West Thurrock
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Recurring problem, sink hole under pavement, 19th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
